message:
feat(resources): skip resolution when all resource categories disabled and deduplicate cached extension entries

- Add all_configured_resources_disabled() predicate to short-circuit
  expensive package manager resolution (npm lookups, settings.json reads,
  network calls) when every --no-* flag is set and no CLI -e sources are
  present — makes startup dramatically faster for resource-disabled
  invocations (Issue #38)
- Skip CLI extension path resolution when extension_paths is empty to
  avoid unnecessary async work
- Add extension deduplication by canonical ID: when both a source .ts
  extension and its transpiled cache copy in ~/.pi/agent/cache/modules/
  are discovered, drop the cache entry to prevent command collisions at
  load time (Issue #37)
- Add module_cache_dir(), is_cache_module_path(), and
  extension_id_from_path() helpers mirroring the JS extension runtime's
  cache directory logic for reliable detection of transpiled copies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
